@rocco_castoro “Vice fucked me over so now I have to work with this asshole” is kind of compelling actually

Sleeping as late as my body will let me tomorrow. We'll see how long that is. Goodnight ya'll!
After we get universal human healthcare we should work on universal pet healthcare. Maybe we should make all prisoners be free vets. Yeah...
Apparently pet insurance for Eevee is going to cost me $16.25 a month - About $200 a year. I'll take it. If only I could insure my shit now.
I'm so cool, I can see my breath in my room.
Eevee is freaking wild tonight. Pacing round and round... she was out all day, I don't understand.
I hurt Taylyn when we were talking by telling her she didn't really have the ability to be 'ladylike' yet. Feeling bad about it.
Taylyn just told me she wished I was mexican so I would be all "Dios mio!"
I'm mixing metaphors.,
Taylyn just puppy-eyed me into listening to her "schedule for the week".

Made some damn good stir fry (if I do say so myself).
Listening to Joanna Newsom for the first time. Really enjoying. The sound of a harp against her voice is just amazing...
Listening to this soundtrack to the Kurt Cobain documentary 'About a Son'. Scored by Ben Gibbard and Steve Fisk. Abstract & great.
Back from work. Took the paycheck straight to the music store. Got drumsticks, wind cover for the mic, and some earplugs.
With work I keep feeling like I am trading moments of my life for money. I guess I am.
Had to stop working on a song to go to work. But I didn't stop until the second I had to leave. Feeling really creative lately.
